skills_and_achievements: seventeen years teaching and counseling experience across elementary and secondary settings; implemented IB Spanish curriculum for grade 6 and regular Spanish for middle/high school; led Alweus/Olweus Bullying Prevention initiatives; LPAC committee service for newcomer ELLs; TELPAS online assessor and campus trainer; experienced with LEP instruction, autism modifications, family engagement, goal setting, workshops, and time management.
